We've had over 119 donors pitch in already, and we're on pace to send a BIG message to everyone watching.

**But I have to be frank with you, friend. The first 48 hours after an opponent announces is the most dangerous time for an incumbent like me.** If Jason Lewis outraises us, or everyone watching sees this team is weak, we could see even bigger attacks and special interests lining up against us.

That's why I'm counting on your help to blow past this $20,000 goal in the next 42 hours, and send a message to everyone watching that we _will_ defend this Senate seat, and Democrats _will_ take back the Senate. subject: President Trump presents Medal of Freedom to basketball legend
body:
This afternoon, President Donald J. Trump presented the Medal of Freedom to Robert “Bob” Cousy—the “Houdini of the Hardwood” who is celebrated as... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7daf43203&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 22, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump presents Medal of Freedom to basketball legend**

**This afternoon,** President Donald J. Trump presented the Medal of Freedom to Robert “Bob” Cousy—the “Houdini of the Hardwood” who is celebrated as one of the greatest players in the history of basketball.

**Off the court** , Cousy fought racism and became a leader for racial equality both within and beyond the NBA. He was instrumental in the creation of the NBA Players Association, established in 1954 to protect the rights of athletes in the league.

🎬 **President Trump:**[“You’re one of the all-time greats in the history of sports.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41ad8510b6&e=3ee4985eea)

**Cousy** **became** a symbol of greatness during his time as a point guard for the Boston Celtics from 1950 to 1963. His playmaking abilities stood out from other guards, introducing a new blend of ball-handling and passing skills to the NBA—the legacy of which can be seen in today’s athletes. His Hall of Fame career speaks for itself: 6 NBA Championships, 13 All-Star appearances, and an unprecedented 8 straight years leading the league in assists. He won the NBA’s Most Valuable Player award in 1957.

**His contributions** to the game continued long after he retired as a player. He went on to coach in the league for several years before becoming a broadcaster for Celtics games. Today, Cousy’s #14 jersey hangs in the rafters of the Boston Garden arena.

[President Trump awards Bob Cousy with America’s highest civilian honor.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c3c41bdc5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Trump Administration cancels student debt for 25,000 disabled veterans**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be1b60f559&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday** , President Trump visited Louisville, Kentucky, to attend the American Veterans 75th National Convention. Before a crowd of thousands of veterans, the President announced new executive action that will ensure 25,000 of America’s wounded warriors receive the education benefits they’ve rightfully earned.

**The newly signed** Presidential Memorandum will “eliminate every penny of federal student loan debt owed by American veterans who are completely and permanently disabled,” President Trump said.

**Of the some 50,000 disabled veterans** qualified to have these loans discharged, only about half have received their benefit. Now, the burdensome process to obtain this hard-earned assistance will be simplified, setting the stage to wipe out an average of $30,000 in debt for the 25,000 remaining eligible veterans.

[See what President Trump is doing to fight for America’s veterans.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9788fff61e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump awards the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Robert Cousy** | August 22, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af32002f3e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98ec06c1f4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2a3806f756)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Will you join me in supporting John Hickenlooper's campaign for the U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

[**Will you donate $10 or whatever you can right now to my friend John Hickenlooper's campaign for the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1768/3e0906/78f4cd5c/3e30e0bb/912317524/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-hickenlooper&source=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&amount=10&refcode=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+donate+10+or+whatever+you+can+r&utm_campaign=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")

John Hickenlooper has dedicated his career to improving Coloradans' lives. From supporting neighborhood redevelopment in Denver as an entrepreneur and small business owner, to serving as a two-term mayor and governor, John's heart and soul are in Colorado. And he's not done yet -- now he's ready to serve Colorado families in Congress and help secure a Democratic majority in the Senate.

**Can you chip in to support his campaign today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1768/3e0906/78f4cd5c/3e30e0ba/912317524/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-hickenlooper?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")

Derek: We're all going to do everything we can to elect a Democratic president and replace Trump. But we also need to give that president partners in the Senate who will help accomplish everything we want to get done. I've been working hard in the Senate to pass legislation that helps folks both in Virginia and around the country -- like expanding affordable health care and taking action to reduce the scourge of gun violence -- and I know that I sure could use a few more Democratic colleagues by my side.

John has the right experience and the right attitude to get things done with me in the Senate. And hey -- I might be biased, but I would say that former mayors and governors make for pretty good Senators! :)

[**Click here to join me in supporting John Hickenlooper's Senate campaign so we can re-take a Democratic majority and start getting things done in Congress.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1768/3e0906/78f4cd5c/3e30e0be/912317524/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-hickenlooper&source=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&amount=10&refcode=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+join+me+in+supporting+John&utm_campaign=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20190822_1_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")

Thanks a lot,

Tim Kaine

subject: Did you see this?

Cenk and I bonded in particular about the need for people-powered campaigns. Unfortunately, some national Democrats still think the path to victory involves corporate money and high-priced consultants. My commitment is to build a movement for change from the bottom up. name: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Attack on our rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
More Cries for Gun Control
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Following the shootings in Dayton, El Paso and Philadelphia, Democrats ranging from Governor Tom Wolf to Congresswoman Susan Wild have grabbed the nearest microphone to call for "common sense gun control."
Unfortunately, they seem more interested in generating sound bites, using the recent tragedies for fundraising and bashing the President than they do in developing realistic solutions.
For example, they call for the passage of legislation for "universal background checks". That ignores the fact that we already have a robust system for background checks for all commercial sales which includes guns shows and purchases over the internet.
Another example is their call to ban "assault weapons."
We know from experience that efforts to ban something whether it is was banning alcohol during Prohibition or making heroin illegal today simply does not work.
Instead all that would be accomplished by their version of "common Sense gun control" would be to restrict the Constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens.
As a result, if elected to Congress I would vote against any effort to ban or restrict the ownership of any semi-automatic firearms (i.e. "assault weapons").
People from all over the district are standing with me to fight for our rights by donating to our campaign some have donated $50 or $100 dollars. If you can afford to I urge you to do so yourself.
---
| | | [Click here to chip in!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yC3Z5FDFqp32QMkaeo7yTTylB8pCibNBobJRIvC6PYdsrgDHTvGuBh4nxV4xkbu5FhJr3vr-AmJYneq0RQTxgBrDX5bp1QVEfPisSu3rOiElHFH0uwxcP4fbjWOj1ARC-__nNKlgDewJH0AhmgmVeAYjjaPm8eKw4NV2arXwZvI=&c=wPG17O_s1myq9rUvK-IxYCft4LHzvusxs6oQDToFsQSae5ehf9MurQ==&ch=Q89zZW4piHgX4nIctl8VdqIEzmRIS5053j1CCcjAu4o0kGtBuHI4_Q==)
---
| The "assault weapon" ban enacted when Clinton was in office had no impact on criminal usage of these weapons then and it would have no effect on criminals now.
In addition, I would vote against any effort to extend background checks to transactions between private individuals within the same state.
That is simply beyond the Constitutional purview of Congress.
We need to focus on those that have and use guns illegally, not on law-abiding citizens so I would support efforts to improve FIX NICS (National Instant Criminal Background Check System) and make it mandatory for all federal agencies to report criminal convictions to the Attorney General and ensure those convictions are put into the background check system.
I would also support efforts to pass comprehensive mental health legislation that would include a due process means of keeping firearms out of the hands of people who legitimately are a danger to themselves or others.
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. \- [Please consider chipping in $10 or more today to assist our campaign fight back for the freedoms that our Founders went to war for. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yC3Z5FDFqp32QMkaeo7yTTylB8pCibNBobJRIvC6PYdsrgDHTvGuBh4nxV4xkbu5FhJr3vr-AmJYneq0RQTxgBrDX5bp1QVEfPisSu3rOiElHFH0uwxcP4fbjWOj1ARC-__nNKlgDewJH0AhmgmVeAYjjaPm8eKw4NV2arXwZvI=&c=wPG17O_s1myq9rUvK-IxYCft4LHzvusxs6oQDToFsQSae5ehf9MurQ==&ch=Q89zZW4piHgX4nIctl8VdqIEzmRIS5053j1CCcjAu4o0kGtBuHI4_Q==)

Our conservative agenda is WORKING for the American people.

The past few years have seen rampant job creation, record-low unemployment numbers, and a BOOMING economy.

Despite all of our country's AMAZING success, Democrats are STILL intent on undoing everything we've accomplished.

That's why Nancy Pelosi REALLY wants to score a socialist victory in the NC-09 Special Election.

As one of my top supporters, I'm asking YOU to step up and split a donation between the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and Dan Bishop's North Carolina Campaign.

We need the resources to fight back against the nasty attacks coming from the left, and that's where you come in. We need you to step up at this critical time.

This is so urgent that we will **DOUBLE-MATCH** all contributions until **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

body:

name: Team de Blasio
subject: Bill's town hall forum live on CNN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Let's get ready to reach everyone who watches this town hall.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e93/1630b3eb/5175e43b/5f54b8e5/459951216/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=709_org_em_fr")
Friend,
This could be a huge moment for our campaign.
This Sunday, at 7:00 p.m. ET, Bill will participate in a live, hour-long town hall on CNN. Opportunities like this to directly reach a national audience don't come up often.
In order to turn curious viewers into real supporters, we need to be prepared to reach everyone who watches the town hall everywhere we can, as soon after the event ends as we can. That's going to take resources.
**[Make sure this campaign has the resources to turn viewers of Bill's CNN town hall this Sunday night into supporters. Contribute $1 today.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e93/1630b3eb/5175e43b/5f54b8e5/459951216/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwOSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=709_org_em_fr")**
The more voters get to know Bill and his proven record of fighting for working people, the more they're likely to join us in supporting him. Let's make sure we make the most of this moment.
Thanks for stepping up today,
Team de Blasio
P.S. Don't forget to gather your friends and family to tune in this Sunday at 7:00 p.m. ET on CNN!

body:

| Peter, crucial debate stage update:

**We expect a series of polls to be released this weekend and early next week ahead of the DNC deadline next Wednesday.**

Here's what that means:

In addition to hitting 130,000 donors, the DNC's rules also require that candidates hit a certain threshold in four separate polls before Wednesday to qualify for the debate stage.

So far, we hit the threshold in one poll after a surge of support following Kirsten's stellar debate performance.

If we pick up three more qualifying polls this weekend, then the only thing we have left to do is hit 130,000 donors and Kirsten can book her flights to the September debate in Houston.

There is _absolutely_ no time to waste.

---
Make a donation of any size right now to help get us closer to 130,000--if these polls swing in our favor, we have to be ready:

clean_body: Here's what that means. | | | | Peter, crucial debate stage update: We expect a series of polls to be released this weekend and early next week ahead of the DNC deadline next Wednesday. Here's what that means: In addition to hitting 130,000 donors, the DNC's rules also require that candidates hit a certain threshold in four separate polls before Wednesday to qualify for the debate stage. So far, we hit the threshold in one poll after a surge of support following Kirsten's stellar debate performance. If we pick up three more qualifying polls this weekend, then the only thing we have left to do is hit 130,000 donors and Kirsten can book her flights to the September debate in Houston. There is absolutely no time to waste. Make a donation of any size right now to help get us closer to 130,000--if these polls swing in our favor, we have to be ready: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks so much, Meredith Meredith Kelly Communications Director Gillibrand 2020 | | | DEADLINE: 5 days to go | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 | Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Romanoff?=
subject: Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROMANOFF FOR COLORADO
body:
July was the hottest month in recorded history. It followed the hottest June.

** Andrew Romanoff for Colorado
------------------------------------------------------------

,

July was the hottest month in recorded history. It followed the hottest June.

We face a climate crisis, and we’re running out of time to solve it.

If we do nothing, heat waves, droughts, storms, floods, and wildfires will become even more frequent and more destructive. Hundreds of millions of people will be forced to flee their homes and turned into climate refugees. And a million other species will vanish.

We need to change course. Now.

Will you join me in fighting for a Green New Deal to end our reliance on fossil fuel and accelerate our transition to a clean-energy economy? (https://act.andrewromanoff.com/signup/green-new-deal/?source=em20190822-mc)

Sign here >> (https://act.andrewromanoff.com/signup/green-new-deal/?source=em20190822-mc)

This is the fundamental moral test of our time.

Will we have the courage to meet it? Not while senators like Cory Gardner are in charge.

Gardner has used his seat on the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee to gut environmental laws and block climate action. But with your help, he won’t be there for long.

Colorado’s Senate race is the most competitive in the country. The most recent polling puts Gardner’s approval rating at just 37%.

If we want to take back the Senate and enact a Green New Deal, we need to flip this seat. That’s why I’m asking you to sign our petition today. (https://act.andrewromanoff.com/signup/green-new-deal/?source=emem20190822-mc)

We can create a healthier environment and millions of good jobs—if we have the will to act.

Andrew Romanoff

============================================================

PAID FOR BY ROMANOFF FOR COLORADO

name: Seth Moulton
subject: So proud of this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for America
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9309891/91593109/-1369401587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzJmZC1kM2M1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jx4kAo4-H2oXT5Vje68hGnA9Luuj8lPHuD0FKei3H0=) Team Moulton, Today, I’m ending my campaign for president. It’s a sad day, but I couldn’t be more proud of what we have accomplished over the last few months. We challenged Donald Trump where he’s weakest—as Commander in Chief—and showed this country that Democrats are the party of making America strong overseas and safe here at home. We ran to take back patriotism from the Republican Party, because true patriotism isn’t about hugging the flag—it’s about fighting to make sure the flag stands for something. We put forward the most ambitious call to national service in a generation, asking all 33 million young Americans to consider serving here at home to tackle the biggest challenges facing our country. And this campaign has even helped me face a few of my own fears. For the first time in my life, I talked publicly about dealing with post-traumatic stress from my four combat tours in Iraq. Our team put forward a plan that will end the stigma around mental health—the same stigma that kept me silent for so long, and that kept every presidential candidate before me from talking about mental health struggles themselves. That’s what this campaign has been about: the courage to be honest about the toughest challenges we face. And I’m so proud of what we’ve done. I couldn’t have accomplished any of it without my wonderful family behind me, especially my amazing wife Liz and daughter Emmy. I couldn’t have done it without my extraordinary team, who worked incredibly hard for a longshot candidate because they believed in me and our mission like they believe in our country. And I definitely couldn’t have done it without you—who supported me and came out to events and volunteered for this campaign all across this country. Each of you reminds me, everywhere and every day, of what truly makes America great. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. While this is the end of my campaign, it is certainly not the end of our efforts. I will once again be running for Congress in the 6th District of Massachusetts, my home, and I can’t wait to get back at it. I will be relaunching my organization, Serve America, to work with all of you to keep the House, to flip the Senate, and to win back statehouses across the country next November. And most of all, I will be doing whatever I can for our nominee in 2020. Now, before I sign off for a while, I want to say one more thing about this campaign: My mentor in college, Reverend Peter Gomes, once said, “Hope is the stuff that gets us through and beyond when the worst that can happen, happens.” And oftentimes, in these past couple of years, and even in these past couple of weeks, it’s felt like the worst that could happen in America has happened. But when I traveled the country and my home district over these last few months, I found hope. I found hope in the veterans I met who are working to end the stigma around mental health by sharing their stories for the very first time. I found hope in the kids who are walking out of school demanding progress on climate change and guns. I found hope in the teachers and reporters who have been striking for basic pay. I found hope in the women who have been marching for basic respect. I found hope in the amazing, diverse, talented group of leaders we have running for president. And I find hope in all of you: in Americans across this country who are banding together—through our shared values—to beat the hateful politics of Donald Trump and fight for who we are. That hope is what gets us, as individuals, through the darkest of times. And it is what will lead our country through the darkest of times as well. I often say that in the men and women I served with in Iraq, I saw the best of America in the worst of circumstances. Well, I saw the same thing in this campaign. I saw Americans from all backgrounds, all races, all religions, standing up and fighting for our values because they _believe_ in our country—even when it lets them down. Especially when it lets them down. Because _that_ is when our country needs us most. Running for president with you behind me has been one of the greatest honors of my life. But I’m focused on the future, and looking forward to what’s ahead. Thank you for everything, Seth | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9309892/91593110/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzJmZC1kM2M1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jx4kAo4-H2oXT5Vje68hGnA9Luuj8lPHuD0FKei3H0=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9309893/91593111/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzJmZC1kM2M1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jx4kAo4-H2oXT5Vje68hGnA9Luuj8lPHuD0FKei3H0=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9309894/91593112/341442065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzJmZC1kM2M1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jx4kAo4-H2oXT5Vje68hGnA9Luuj8lPHuD0FKei3H0=&hl=en) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9309895/91593113/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzJmZC1kM2M1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jx4kAo4-H2oXT5Vje68hGnA9Luuj8lPHuD0FKei3H0=)

Ever wonder what it's like to win one of these debate contests?

We want to introduce you to Ellie, a second-grade teacher from Cincinnati, Ohio. She was the lucky winner of our last contest to watch Elizabeth at the Detroit debates.

When Ellie got the call that she won the free trip, she couldn't believe it -- her $3 donation was actually noticed. She called her sister Maggie right away and before long, they were at the airport headed to Detroit.

**You could be going to Houston with someone important to you. One lucky grassroots donor will win a free trip to the next Democratic debate -- with flights and hotel covered.**

**[Chip in today to be automatically entered for your chance to win a free trip to the Houston Democratic debate.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529041/45c30650/1224a1a6c/6684dd7d/3529121831/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImhvdXN0b25kZWJhdGUiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSTU5Rl9DT05fQ09OX1RfMjAxOTA4MjNfVjFTM19QIn0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/houstondebate?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI59F_CON_CON_T_20190823_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Some of Ellie's favorite parts of debate night?
* Balcony seats right in front of the stage, so they could see all the action
* Seeing Anderson Cooper reporting from just a few rows away
* Feeling chills in the room when Elizabeth made the case for big, structural change
* Knowing that she was part of something bigger than herself

We asked Ellie what she would tell someone thinking about entering the debate contest.

**She said, "I still can't believe that two normal sisters from Ohio got this once-in-a-lifetime chance. Any contribution is helpful, and even a teacher who found $3 to chip in can make an impact."**

name: Jacqueline
subject: wrong hornets' nest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Matt Bevin started this week in a courtroom, being sued by his own lieutenant governor who described herself as "insulted" by how he's treating her.
|
---

| | Peter,

Matt Bevin started this week in a courtroom, being sued by his own lieutenant governor who described herself as "insulted" by how he's treating her.

Then he launched _**yet another**_ round of insults and attacks on teachers, this time claiming that we protested his illegal pension cuts to... get free time off of work. Say what?

It seems like he just can't help himself. Matt Bevin is a bully. As an educator, it's my job to help teach our kids not to behave like that.

But Bevin clearly expects all of us in Kentucky to back down to his bullying. **Well, as I like to say,_he swatted the wrong hornets ' nest._**

We're fired up. I see it every day on the campaign trail: thousands of doors being knocked, hundreds of volunteers and just an outpouring of support.

**[Add your name to say that we're not backing down.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ad3/ad6dc73/14f68a1c/db45f7e/310059926/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://beshearcoleman.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/beshear-hornetsnest") This November we're bringing back decency and respect to Frankfort. **

Thanks,
Jacqueline | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ad3/ad6dc73/14f68a1c/db45f7f/310059926/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20190823db__216__&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Irresponsible Dem Attacks on ICE Inspire Violence by Domestic Terrorists
body:
"Some prominent Democrats have declared war on the Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency (ICE), threatening the lives of federal officials..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ed3120360&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Irresponsible Dem Attacks on ICE Inspire Violence by Domestic Terrorists**

“Some prominent Democrats have declared war on the Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency (ICE), threatening the lives of federal officials in order to advance a radical political agenda and a policy of open borders,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes for Fox News.

In the past month alone, there have been four attacks on ICE employees and facilities.

“Unfortunately, Democrats and their media enablers routinely downplay left-wing violence – and in some cases actively encourage it. Instead of condemning the attacks, leading Democrats and much of the mainstream media have acted as though they never happened. This is an intolerable dereliction of duty, especially on the part of the supposed ‘guardians of democracy’ in the press.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=049085faed&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham told [_Breitbart News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96857af463&e=3ee4985eea) she is ‘disgusted’ by the racism and antisemitism displayed by New York Times politics editor Tom Wright-Piersanti,” Matthew Boyle reports. Wright-Piersanti, an editor on the _Times’_ politics desk, has made a number of comments he himself called “offensive” on Twitter.
---
|
---
| “When Vice President Mike Pence stepped off Air Force Two on Wednesday, 10-year-old Alex Taylor was waiting on the tarmac — alongside his mother, Jennie, and Gov. Gary Herbert,” Lisa Riley Roche reports for [_Deseret News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b3c710403&e=3ee4985eea). “Alex, the son of the late Utah National Guard Maj. Brent Taylor, who was killed in an insider attack on a Kabul, Afghanistan, training center in November 2018, described being part of the welcoming party and meeting the vice president as ‘really cool’ as he clutched a commemorative Air Force Two coin he’d received as a gift.”
---
|
---
| “On an airboat tour Tuesday, accompanied by [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4e51b2e27&e=3ee4985eea), Border Patrol members carved through the Rio Grande looking for trouble, slowing down occasionally to peer into the trees. This time, they didn’t find it,” Adam Shaw writes. Migrant crossings are down significantly and Sector Chief Patrol Agent Felix Chavez credits President Trump’s push to get Mexico to cooperate with immigration efforts. “What we’ve seen here in Laredo Sector is a reduction in 30 percent in our apprehension numbers, southwest border-wide numbers are down 38 percent,” Chavez said.
---
|
---
| “The USMCA is vital for farmers and businesses of all sizes across Michigan, and we need our Representatives in D.C. to urge Speaker Nancy Pelosi to bring this to a vote this summer so that we can begin to experience the benefits of this modernized trade deal,” former Speaker of the Michigan House Lew Dodak writes in [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8972c418d0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ddbff9b48e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1923b9b3ff&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8a3dedb6ee)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Mike
subject: a funny thing happened in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Folks --

We were just at an event in New Hampshire. And when Tim finished speaking, a number of people asked how they could get involved with our campaign.

This isn't just a New Hampshire story, folks. The more people learn about Tim and his new and better vision for the country, the more they want to support us.

**We don 't have much time left though: the date to qualify for the debates is coming up, and after checking our numbers we are still coming up short.**

[**Help us reach the 2% we need in 4 polls by contributing $3 today. The debate stage is within reach if you act now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+reach+the+2+we+need+in+4+polls+b&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_1_1")

Thanks for everything you do!
Mike

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Paul LePage just endorsed Susan Collins →
body:
Here's her lineup:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68d4/1186014092/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Hi there -
Remember Paul LePage? Maine's former Republican governor who made national headlines when he called people of color "the enemy"?
And who once suggested black men were coming to Maine to sell drugs and impregnate white women?
**Well, he just endorsed Susan Collins.**
Here's the rest of her lineup:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68ab/1186014092/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190823-full")
Meanwhile, Sara Gideon has been endorsed by EMILY's List, End Citizens United, dozens of state representatives and senators, and thousands of grassroots supporters.
So yeah...we can take them.
**[But we need your help to do it. So please, make a $3 contribution today. This fight won't be easy - or cheap - but we CAN win.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68ab/1186014092/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190823-full")**
Susan Collins may have Paul LePage, and Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell - but we have you, and that's what's going to make a difference.
Thank you for being a part of this team.
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68ab/1186014092/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190823-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68aa/1186014092/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd8/4bef7a87/6843bf71/287f68a9/1186014092/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Dr. Michael Mann
subject: Why this climate scientist is endorsing Hickenlooper for Senate [Will you join me?]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
A personal message from Dr. Michael Mann, climate scientist and recipient of the 2019 Tyler Prize for Environmental Achievement:
---
| | [](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190823_HicMann_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190823_HicMann_U3_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190823_HicMann_U3_X1") Friends -- I've spent my career sounding the alarm on climate change and the Republican effort to obstruct climate action. And today, I'm proud to endorse John Hickenlooper for U.S. Senate in Colorado. But the first 48 hours of any campaign are critical to its success -- That's why a group of generous donors has agreed to **TRIPLE MATCH** all donations to support John Hickenlooper's campaign for Senate by the end of the day. [**Hick 's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- He's relying on us. | Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
---

name: M.E. Smith, Team Hick
subject: They're scared - and they should be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Yesterday morning, John announced he was running for Senate in Colorado--and just as we suspected, the other side is already coming after us. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446ce/954632111/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Yesterday morning, John announced he was running for Senate in Colorado--and just as we suspected, the other side is already coming after us.

Donald Trump wasted no time attacking John, sending out a tweet late last night.

**Here 's why: They're scared--and they should be.** They know that Cory Gardner's record is out of step with Colorado. They know we've got a very real shot at winning this thing and taking away their majority in the Senate. And so, Friend, you can bet your bottom dollar that we're in for a tough fight.

[**_If you 're ready to fight back, will you chip in right now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190823_MES_20190823-fr-MES-postlaunch-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

No matter what the other side does, we're committed to building this campaign the right way, with the help of a grassroots team made up of people like you. In just 24 hours, we've seen a groundswell of support from folks like you who are ready for change in Colorado and the U.S. Senate.

So to Cory Gardner and his team, I say: Bring it on.

[**_Help show that this team is ready for whatever they throw at us --make a donation of whatever you can today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190823_MES_20190823-fr-MES-postlaunch-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
M.E. Smith

M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190823_MES_20190823-fr-MES-postlaunch-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446ca/954632111/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446cb/954632111/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446c8/954632111/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446c9/954632111/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446c6/954632111/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446c7/954632111/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771715/691c9bd/6ebf5715/11a446ca/954632111/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Another threat from Nadler and the Dems!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Have you seen this most recent threat from Chairman Nadler regarding impeaching President Trump?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rJGtlWD9Ft80Gj_kuBJKGuSKlMup8wX-1HtGcAc6j_JJdq9zQhPIiwo1AIH7AwTkEI150QZo_4JfNyREUizDddS1CWKRE2fSDwQZUhjws-DM4X4PuOkfjbNqUXfbeNk0TySyNAqbL_vrKlTbpL43Js58So1tno7tOM8Njx3NixagnmhRyXnr3BFg8QhO3zQEXReHMEi89UFnzjDdCvmkzbFdlsjGYk6WafyS0PP-t68=&c=cPg1KJziEsAjE5rizXmGfKg6LwyFMopBtM7rptfyPnhHuKXrnny7gA==&ch=fjb9FWUfMvxPtqiJg6krAe0ML6pllSysnhGphZt9nzbHCzTRl7V7gA==)
---
| Rep. Nadler and Democrats can't be serious. After two years, multiple hearings, and $30 million in wasted taxpayer dollars we know that there was NO COLLUSION and still, Jerry Nadler and Democrats continue to threaten President Trump with impeachment.
We need to send a strong message to Rep. Nadler and the Democrats to leave our President alone. As President Trump's top defender you know I am willing to send that message. I just need to know that you are with me and our President. Can we count on your support?
---

After two years, multiple hearings, and $30 million in wasted taxpayer dollars we know that there was NO COLLUSION and still, Jerry Nadler and Democrats continue to threaten President Trump with impeachment. name: Team Beto
subject: Three candidates dropped out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
Seth Moulton. Jay Inslee. John Hickenlooper.
Three more candidates are out. This incredible field of candidates who stepped up to run was always going to narrow, but Team Beto is in a really good position. We’re one of just a handful of campaigns qualified for the next debates, thanks to your grassroots support.
We set a fundraising goal one week ago and we’re inching closer and closer. The funds we raise right now are integral if we want to compete hard in this next stage with fewer and fewer candidates but more and more voters paying attention. More than half our money comes in from emails like this one, and those resources help us get the word out.
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now towards our goal? Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a big difference as we reach for this one.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27232?refcode=ema20190823-50702&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=50702%2E444211%2EnBUYD7)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27232?refcode=ema20190823-50702&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=50702%2E444211%2EnBUYD7)**
If even just one-out-of-three of you click and contribute, we’ll have more than enough to reach our goal quickly. Without PACs, without special interests, without lobbyists or corporations, _this_ is how we’ll win the White House for the people.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=50702%2E444211%2EnBUYD7). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Ed Markey
subject: This call has me worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

I just got off an urgent strategy call with my team. Here's what we're up against:
* The RNC raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month.

* That right-wing cash will make its way into Senate races like mine to fund relentless attacks.

* And my team just told me that if we're going to withstand the RNC's fundraising surge, we have to raise another $10,000 before the bank closes today.

_**[Our online supporters are our best chance to help us reach this goal by 5 pm. Can I count on you to rush $27 or more?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082319_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

President Trump is coming after our Senate seat. The GOP's Senate majority is in danger, and Donald Trump and national Republicans will leave no seat unscathed this election to keep their power.

**That 's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive, and you're our only hope. **

_**[Before the bank closes, rush $27 or more to my campaign and help me stay in the fight for our values. We can't afford to miss a single deadline.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082319_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Trump's rally in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I don't know where else to turn right now, everyone, so Maggie said that I could reach out.
Just over a week ago, Donald Trump personally recruited his former campaign manager Corey Lewandowski to run for this seat at his campaign rally in New Hampshire, and now we have until midnight tonight to raise the $50,000 we need to fight back. But we're still way short, and our match is about to expire.
Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to CBS is saying that our race in New Hampshire will decide Senate control. But The Washington Post just named this seat one of the most likely to flip -- so if we want to take back the Senate, we have to take full advantage of this match opportunity right now.
Mitch McConnell's right-wing group has already launched their first round of attack ads against us -- and as of today, GOP outside groups are spending more against us than all the other in-cycle Democratic senators combined. **They know that Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose here -- but missing this rapid-response goal would mean losing in New Hampshire.**
**With Republicans going all in on this race and just one day left until our match expires, every dollar could be the difference between a Republican and a Democratic Senate** :
[**Please, I 'm counting on you to give $3 before our match deadline at midnight: Every dollar will go twice as far toward winning in New Hampshire so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3a4/2a380d31/3c3370dc/f0c326/2661906676/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjNfTVdINENKU19STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190823_MWH4CJS_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much,
Jeanne

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Voter suppression puts the presidency at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We can't get the president we deserve if we don't ensure every voter can access the ballot. And that work starts now. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e11/1527604594/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - With 21 candidates currently seeking the Democratic nomination to become the next President of the United States, many eyes seem fixed on the primary election. But we can't get the president we deserve if we don't ensure every voter can access the ballot. And that work starts now. We must recognize voter suppression as the crisis of our day. Because the true erosion of our democracy is using the laws as they presently exist to undermine the very voting administration we need and the elected leaders that we deserve. It's well known that two of the last three American presidents--both Republicans George W. Bush and Donald Trump--lost the popular vote before they took office. What's less discussed is just how much of a role voter suppression played in the outcome of the 2000 and 2016 presidential elections. From our country's inception, we decided who would be eligible to be a citizen and whose voices would be heard. And it's taken us hundreds of years to try to get it right. In 2000, Florida's post-Civil War era law stripping the right to vote from former felons was still on the books. And in the 90's, widespread voter purges began to disenfranchise voters. Voter roll purges in Florida relied on just a 70 percent match with the felon database. Despite warnings about false positives from the company contracted to handle these purges, the state proceeded. On November 7, 2000, election night tallies showed George W. Bush leading Al Gore by 1,784 votes in Florida, triggering an automatic recount. Right away, a young Ted Cruz, then a Bush campaign aide, began assembling Bush's legal team. The case ultimately moved through the Florida Supreme Court, which ordered a statewide manual recount by a 4-3 vote on December 8. Immediately, the Bush campaign appealed to the U.S. Supreme Court. The very next day, in a 5-4 decision, the U.S. Supreme Court voted to halt the Florida recount, thereby awarding Florida's 25 electoral votes to George W. Bush. And the next month, Bush was inaugurated as the 43rd president. Days before the inauguration, the NAACP, ACLU, the People for the American Way, and 19,000 African-American Florida voters filed a class action suit against Florida's Secretary of State, challenging the felon voter purge and arguing it disenfranchised black voters. As a result of the settlement, news came to light that as many as 12,000 voters had been wrongly purged, 22 times Bush's 537 vote margin. [**Friend , we can turn the tide and win the fight to protect the right to vote. But it's going to take resources to ensure we can fight back against attempts to disenfranchise voters. Will you chip in today?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e1e/1527604594/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight--inc--1?refcode=IE082219BUSH") \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e1e/1527604594/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight--inc--1?refcode=IE082219BUSH")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e1f/1527604594/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e1c/1527604594/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa508/34a064cc/184b3344/7031e1d/1527604594/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

Enter by [contributing here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190821-contest?t=14&refcode2=6048_5755789_cL8zj1&akid=6048%2E5755789%2EcL8zj1) or [click here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/kdh-contest-september-debate-entry/?t=15&akid=6048%2E5755789%2EcL8zj1) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Houston, Texas; one night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to attend the DNC Presidential Debate in Houston, Texas (approx. retail value $5,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-contest-september-debate-official-rules/?t=16&akid=6048%2E5755789%2EcL8zj1). Sponsor: Kamala Harris for the People, P.O. Box 86, Baltimore, MD 21203.

subject: Legalize it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
On my first day as President, I will pardon every person imprisoned for a low-level, non-violent marijuana offense and I would high five them on their way out of jail.

| | | |
---
| friend --

On my first day as President, I will pardon every person imprisoned for a low-level, non-violent marijuana offense and I would high five them on their way out of jail. [**If you are with me -- add your name here.**](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ4tK1lTpWNzsTJs-2BTmOjIjvqoH3u6dcP9Nl5LR-2BgDqs-2BVe4o5aDGSJgqN-2FDK5pGYasjCjPuYxdPont8NW7g9N4DWWZzNmTfho9DMrge4Oghp3l8wE-2FkDPXDZ1vUas8Z7XGC-2FxdA2weJiK9aMMqHx7ocU3vLjWOhDN9-2FDzm47sPD7tzAyYn6UA98If0ilGqzIhs849LK5Ilfo8by4cwAKO0qonWuVbSh2JWvkACIotOwE5-2BK6M41obUfyrnPSv89JwNgaUZSdRS6a5rf1IbLDClo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FQYiJXPY68LhUEHXhY2oypMbxwjOCbsN3BEFY5GqDBfi1yEKKY64JOUKZR3GFpLrINNQWbKORT8Z6T-2B5Qg4O8vXD2aFv6Gb-2B1ejg-2FyVVH3tdcrw-2Ba88dhLdp1HcEW3GIKDa4I63IBSvtlx4ure1qXv38DK2N58Ki3PMjNj7IL6C3YtdJ7ULEGSeiLFBQc1YH-2FCM6RpSEcW154GHPbx4rWPAA63c4S7CQ8VVnAUwxHeMc-2FTBo7VYukDn4E-2FxB29Wb-2Bmcc3IxrP69qD5kqQGKb1PPE77kxmin7qHUMzYdTjrVrR9Kk3QSdZ-2Frwn-2Bs7w-2F7IHLPtlwpMGAERErcLQXw1O8w-3D-3D)

Marijuana is still classified as a Schedule I narcotic, putting it in the ranks of heroin. **Frankly, the criminalization of it is stupid and racist.**

Even though cannabis is now legal for adult use in 11 states and the District of Columbia, there have been hundreds of thousands of Americans incarcerated for it, particularly targeted are people of color. Our criminal justice system is broken.

**We need to resolve the ambiguity and legalize marijuana at the federal level. This would improve safety, social equity, and generate tens of billions of dollars in new revenue based on legal cannabis businesses.** [**Add your name if you support the legalization of marijuana and expunging the federal convictions of all marijuana-related use.**](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ4tK1lTpWNzsTJs-2BTmOjIjvqoH3u6dcP9Nl5LR-2BgDqs-2BVe4o5aDGSJgqN-2FDK5pGYasjCjPuYxdPont8NW7g9N4DWWZzNmTfho9DMrge4Oghp3l8wE-2FkDPXDZ1vUas8Z7XGC-2FxdA2weJiK9aMMqHx7ocJ9tmI2xEPdPDPEe9bD0R51Ui2cOiiPCB-2B3GbUdvOKvlKYsnfIei3SebBJXOBGMqKVyB8Aar8JtBeXP0WmjiUB-2FcaIbS6FLIgHrnuFh-2FV2ktS4TXCsE5Iow8Ye9MEW2gI-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FQYiJXPY68LhUEHXhY2oypMbxwjOCbsN3BEFY5GqDBfi1yEKKY64JOUKZR3GFpLrINNQWbKORT8Z6T-2B5Qg4O8vXD2aFv6Gb-2B1ejg-2FyVVH3tdcrw-2Ba88dhLdp1HcEW3GIKDa4I63IBSvtlx4ure1qXv6gp7Gcf9Ofi-2BcTZPxgA7yQkHsom5ZezkL-2BCjjwRJtvYuRXiyH7hlZuMR02Mel-2FchZL-2FRdaXBV3MdFekPQJxwka2y-2BjoODs8ob7fKtR2X9PJsi6tSSGXCNpGcdy-2B4-2Bc5KjUJgidkYUoak8PzzvbwwOL01qNfcIhUk18N-2BpL717CYQwthA7RZciPTcTdUqtRCdA-3D-3D)

If we legalize cannabis, then we’ll:
* Provide equity for those convicted of marijuana use and possession.
* Provide regulation and oversight of the marijuana industry.
* Generate revenue and reinvest in communities hardest hit by the failed “war on drugs.”

For the sake of equity, justice, and the health of all Americans, marijuana must be legalized federally. Add your name if you agree:

|

We've been crunching the numbers team. Our campaign is at a critical point.

**We need to get to 2% in 4 polls to qualify for the next debate. We 're close, but we aren't quite there yet. Will you give $3 now to be that final push?**

We usually don't reach out to supporters ourselves, but as the team responsible for analyzing polls and data, we felt it would mean more coming from us when we say [**your support is truly critical in this moment.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+your+support+is+truly+critical+in+this+m&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2")

The data shows that the more people learn about Tim's plans the more they support him -- but he needs to make it to the debate stage in Houston. It will give us a national platform to get his message out -- especially to undecided voters and those in critical early voting states.

As pollsters, we know how important it is for Tim to reach as many people as possible. We're counting on you.

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/Houston**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomHouston&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190823_2_2")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: We wanted to check back in on this request from Ed. We must bring in another $10,000 for Ed's campaign before the bank closes, and right now we're only 50% of the way there.

_**[Will you rush $ or more and help us close the gap before 5 pm?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082319_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Read more from Ed Markey:
* * *
Hello,

I just got off an urgent strategy call with my team. Here's what we're up against:
* The RNC raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month.

* That right-wing cash will make its way into Senate races like mine to fund relentless attacks.

* And my team just told me that if we're going to withstand the RNC's fundraising surge, we have to raise another $10,000 before the bank closes today.

_**[Our online supporters are our best chance to help us reach this goal by 5 pm. Can I count on you to rush $27 or more?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082319_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

**That 's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive, and you're our only hope. **

_**[Before the bank closes, rush $27 or more to my campaign and help me stay in the fight for our values. We can't afford to miss a single deadline.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082319_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Michael (personal)
subject: September debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends - I wanted to come to you directly.

Because of the DNC's arbitrary rules, I won't be on stage in Houston next month.

The DNC is stifling debate at a time when we need it most. These rules have created exactly the wrong outcomes and they will not help us beat Donald Trump.

But this fight is far from over.

I won't be stopped by the DNC's unprecedented and counterproductive process that rewards celebrities, billionaires who can buy their way in, and perma-candidates who have been running for decades.

[**I am staying focused on what matters most: talking to voters and beating Trump.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac6d/134673f2/cfdc592/699644df/666923650/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign has never been about being center stage.

It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and when I decided to run for president, I knew the road ahead would be long.

There's too much at stake to back down now.

[**If you 're with me, will you donate any amount to help me get to the next debate in October?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac6d/134673f2/cfdc592/699644df/666923650/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Send the DNC a message that the voters decide our nominee -- not some operatives in a backroom.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac6d/134673f2/cfdc592/699644df/666923650/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Warner HQ
subject: A two-front fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If we want to win in 2019 and 2020, we'll have to fight on two fronts: The Trump campaign wants to flip Virginia in 2020 and unseat Mark, so they're already investing heavily in our Commonwealth. A
|
---
| | Derek,

**If we want to win in 2019 and 2020, we 'll have to fight on two fronts:**
1. The Trump campaign wants to flip Virginia in 2020 and unseat Mark, so they're already investing heavily in our Commonwealth.
2. All that money being spent in Virginia means the Republicans in the General Assembly will have tons of resources to defend their majority this November.

If we're going to take back the majority in 2019 and re-elect Mark in 2020, we'll need your help. **Can you chip in now so we 'll have the funds we need to fight on two fronts?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fronts?refcode=20190823nd__184__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** **Our FIRST order of business: flipping the General Assembly in November.** Mark's helping Democratic candidates for the General Assembly in every way he can -- from launching canvasses to hosting roundtables. Just recently he logged over 200 miles campaigning with 11 candidates in a 48-hour swing!

**THEN** , after we retake the General Assembly on November 5th, **we can continue our blue streak into 2020 and re-elect Mark.**

By re-electing Mark we'll be sending _a champion for Virginians_ back to Washington. Mark has fought hard to secure our elections, create good jobs, and defend affordable healthcare. We can count on him to keep fighting hard for us as long as he serves in the Senate.

Look, these fights in 2019 and 2020 aren't going to be easy -- or cheap -- but they are winnable if we all work together. **[Can we count on you to pitch in to help Democrats win now and in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d151/53d9897e/52d6d248/1c8e5ed1/213552254/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fronts?refcode=20190823nd__184__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thanks for your support,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Celebrating our Military
body:
As Hoosier Republicans, we honor our military -- from our active duty servicemembers to our veterans through the years. They keep our nation free... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/celebrating-our-military?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=af8dd17e80&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Celebrating our Military_** As Hoosier Republicans, we honor our military -- from our active duty servicemembers to our veterans through the years. They keep our nation free, make America shine as a beacon of hope around the world, and are the reason we continue to have the privilege of electing our leaders today.

And at this year's [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e32d0a59a9&e=1acd9bb3d6), we're thrilled to once again honor and celebrate our veterans and our military heroes. I'm so excited to share with you that this year we'll be welcoming three very special guests to headline the dinner \-- **Congressmen and combat veterans****Dan Crenshaw** , **Brian Mast** and **Jim Baird**. These three men have made undeniable sacrifices for our country and our freedom.

The dinner is on October 14, and we'll be at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

We all know Indiana's own **Congressman Jim Baird** , but you probably remember the three of them from the [viral tweet that **Congressman Mast** posted](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=138e9cda1e&e=1acd9bb3d6) in January with the caption, "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." Of course, that's after **Congressman Crenshaw** was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live. It was a wrong and unnecessary attack, but at that moment **Congressman Crenshaw** taught us an unforgettable lesson in forgiveness.

We're really, really excited to welcome this team to center stage at our 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner, and we'd love for you to be there, too. Tickets are already starting to go quickly for this very special event, so if you'd like to be there, you can [book tickets directly here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ca847630c&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [email Zach](mailto:ZachWillis@HolcombforIndiana.com?subject=Fall%20Dinner) on our team.

We hope to see you there!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Governor Holcomb: Bringing the World to Indiana!_** We’ve all heard **Governor Eric Holcomb** say it – he’s _taking Indiana to the world and bringing the world to Indiana_. After all, Indiana is home to 1,004 foreign-owned business establishments that support more than 193,000 jobs across the state.

This week, he brought the world to Indiana with:
* Germany’s new consul general in Chicago, Wolfgang Moessinger, made his first trip to Indiana this week! He stopped by the Statehouse to meet with **Governor Holcomb** , and to continue to grow his country’s relationship with Indiana. Did you know that Germany is the state's second-largest foreign direct investor with 120 businesses here employing 15,100+ Hoosiers?
* Japan’s outgoing consul general in Chicago, Naoki Ito, made his final trip to Indiana before he departs. He met**Governor Holcomb** at the Governor’s Residence, and together they planted an Okame Cherry Tree on the grounds to commemorate Consul General Ito’s contributions to Indiana. Japan is a top international partner for job creation with Indiana – 319 Japan-based businesses now call Indiana home!

And earlier today, **Governor Holcomb** announced that next month he will lead economic development trips to Asia, meeting with leaders and job creators in Japan, Korea, China and India. Today's economy is global, and the partnerships that **Governor Holcomb** is building are helping create great jobs throughout Indiana.

Thank you, **Governor Holcomb** , for your commitment to elevating Indiana’s position around the world and for creating more opportunities for Hoosiers!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Busy August for Indiana's Congressional Delegation!_**
Congress may be on recess in August, but the members of Indiana's Republican Congressional delegation have been busy meeting with Hoosiers across Indiana! Check out these photos, and learn more below about what they've been up to:
* **Senator Todd Young** visited NSWC Crane, an important economic driver in Southern Indiana and a key component of US strategic deterrence.
* **Senator Mike Braun** has been all across Indiana on his 50-city Summer of Solutions Tour, which so far has included stops in Warsaw, Columbia City, Fort Wayne, Portland, Hartford City, Farmland, Indianapolis, Mooresville, Columbus, Evansville, Terre Haute, Rockville, Cayuga, Attica, Fowler, Westville, Knox and Monticello.
* **Congresswoman Walorski **visited a veteran-owned business, Express Employment Professionals in Elkhart, to talk about how we can help our veterans get great jobs when they return to civilian life.
* **Congressman Jim Banks** held a town hall meeting in Fort Wayne, which was his sixth of the year. His previous town hall meetings this year have been in New Haven, South Whitley, Montpelier, Huntington and Dunkirk.
* **Congressman Jim Baird** helped kick-off the Indiana State Fair by attending the annual Ham Breakfast and supporting Indiana's farmers.
* **Congresswoman Susan Brooks** joined community leaders and supporters at a Bread for the World event to raise awareness about childhood hunger and food insecurity in Indiana.
* **Congressman Greg Pence** visited Atterbury-Muscatatuck to learn more about the men, women and technologies that are defending our nation and our allies.
* **Congressman Larry Bucshon** hosted four town hall meetings across the district -- in Evansville, Linton, Terre Haute, and Washington.
* **Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** attended a Shop Talk meeting with local farmers and agricultural leaders in Crothersville.

| **_Last Chance! Join Us for the G.O.Party!_**
This is your last chance! Join us next week on Wednesday, August 28 for the [G.O.Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=292f49dae4&e=1acd9bb3d6) – a big party to celebrate Hoosier Republicans’ hard work and results for Indiana!

You’ll have a great time with your fellow Republicans – including **Governor Eric Holcomb** and **Chairman Kyle Hupfer **\-- at the **Dallara IndyCar Factory** in Speedway! We’ve got the music, the drinks and light food. All you need to do is RSVP – which you can do [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=967e4f8f5d&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
[RSVP now for the G.O.Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4840d4bbb1&e=1acd9bb3d6)[!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9573559409&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| **_National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!_** Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2d5a9c45a1&e=1acd9bb3d6), learn about sponsorship opportunities [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9724cbf6fd&e=1acd9bb3d6), and register to attend the national convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cd3dd7ca97&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce8d/3eb3e2fc/5fc52cd8/744bb916/3719778819/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Locking up children and throwing away the key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d4e9/6cd27893/5164b4a4/1580e2f2/799672885/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | You know the horrors Donald Trump is inflicting on migrant families, families seeking asylum, and their children. This is the president and administration who literally took small children crying from their parents' arms. Who has said they won't give flu vaccines to migrants even though a number of children have died from the flu. They told a court they shouldn't have to provide children in their custody with soap. They're only trying to make things worse:** this week, the Trump administration announced its new child imprisonment rule to allow them to lock up children indefinitely.** _Children_. Locked up in jail _for... years?_ Simply horrible. Outrageous. Vile. **[Sign the petition and tell Donald Trump: Jailing children indefinitely is cruel and wrong.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d4e9/6cd27893/5164b4a4/1580e2f3/799672885/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/indefinite-detention/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-08-indefinite-detention-email")** **_Jeff_** [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d4e9/6cd27893/5164b4a4/1580e2f3/799672885/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/indefinite-detention/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-08-indefinite-detention-email") |

| Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care.
