name: SENATE ALERT (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: Mitch McConnell just confirmed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to stop McConnell's dangerous court-packing. We MUST prevent Trump's hatred from spreading throughout our entire justice syst
---
| | **BREAKING: McConnell rushes 99 Trump judges through Senate** **[10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: We need to act NOW. Sign the emergency petition to STOP McConnell from packing our courts with Trump 's dangerous judges. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8e/2557351888/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190823_em_pet_b1_sav_all_rs")** | Quickly -- Mitch McConnell just fast-tracked an alarming number of Trump judges through the Senate.

**If we don 't act NOW -- these judges will carry out Trump's dangerous agenda on the bench for generations to come.** [_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to stop McConnell 's dangerous court-packing. We MUST prevent Trump's hatred from spreading throughout our entire justice system. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8e/2557351888/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190823_em_pet_b1_sav_all_rs") **NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8e/2557351888/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190823_em_pet_b1_sav_all_rs")**
---

This is downright alarming.

Mitch McConnell is sabotaging our court system at a blazing place.

He just rushed 99 -- _NINETY-NINE_ \-- Trump judges through the Senate.

**99** far right judges who will roll back our health care.

**99** dangerous judges who will uphold Trump's cruel, hateful policies.

**99** Trump judges who will have LIFETIME appointments to carry out his orders.

After Mitch McConnell stole President Obama's Supreme Court seat -- we can't let him hand Trump the rest of our justice system, too.

[_**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign Ben Ray 's emergency petition. We MUST stop McConnell and Trump from packing the courts and sabotaging our entire justice system. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8e/2557351888/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/judicial-survey?source=20190823_em_pet_b1_sav_all_rs")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8f/2557351888/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8c/2557351888/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f8d/2557351888/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f82/2557351888/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f83/2557351888/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4da/18e32a7f/559d5fb2/7bd39f80/2557351888/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Important survey on the state of the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
[Survey] First question: How do you feel about the trajectory of our campaign?
#
We’re conducting an official team survey, and we want your voice to be counted. You know, we know, and Beto knows that no one can defeat Trump alone. It’ll take all of us working together. And we need to hear from smart people like you about our campaign strategy going forward.
[Can you fill out this quick survey? It only takes a minute, and your voice is really important as we plan out the next few weeks with Beto.](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190823/?source=ema20190823-50725&t=1&akid=50725%2E444211%2EbIf-Yd)
**Here’s the top question:**
[How do you feel about the trajectory of our campaign?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190823/?source=ema20190823-50725&t=2&akid=50725%2E444211%2EbIf-Yd) Very positive Positive Okay Negative Very Negative Unsure **[Continue the survey →](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190823/?source=ema20190823-50725&t=3&akid=50725%2E444211%2EbIf-Yd)**
---
This is your campaign. Hundreds of thousands of you have already chipped in to own a piece of it. We built it together, all without a dime from PACs, corporations, or special interests. That’s why hearing from you is so important today.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=50725%2E444211%2EbIf-Yd). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARweWCU6nWWgdZh2k6mjZ7nO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190823_fr&n=1) Friend — we’re going to be honest, this week’s news has really demonstrated why we need to work every day to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. He’s:
* Embarrassed us on the international stage,
* Quoted someone comparing him to Jesus on Twitter,
* Publicly disagreed with the Federal Reserve over how they are handling the potential for a recession, and
* Continued his unhinged rants on Twitter at all ungodly hours of the day and night.

In the face of a potential economic downturn; in the face of North Korea developing nuclear weapons; in the face of rising authoritarianism around the globe, _do we really want**Donald Trump** to be the most powerful person in the world?_ We're facing an uphill battle to defeat Trump in 2020, but be we know that with you on our team we stand a fighting chance. Thanks for standing with us. — Team Weld | | [DONATE TO TEAM WELD ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARweWCU6nWWgdZh2k6mjZ7nO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190823_fr&n=2)

clean_body: | Friend — we’re going to be honest, this week’s news has really demonstrated why we need to work every day to defeat Donald Trump in 2020. He’s: Embarrassed us on the international stage, Quoted someone comparing him to Jesus on Twitter, Publicly disagreed with the Federal Reserve over how they are handling the potential for a recession, and Continued his unhinged rants on Twitter at all ungodly hours of the day and night. In the face of a potential economic downturn; in the face of North Korea developing nuclear weapons; in the face of rising authoritarianism around the globe, do we really wantDonald Trump to be the most powerful person in the world? We're facing an uphill battle to defeat Trump in 2020, but be we know that with you on our team we stand a fighting chance. Thanks for standing with us. — Team Weld | | Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
